pages.text: 开饭啦！妈妈端着香喷喷的饭菜走出来。可是咘咘呢？她正在客厅跑来跑去！一会儿摸摸沙发，一会儿踢踢球。“咘咘，来吃饭啦！”“等一下！我还要玩！”
pages.text_en: Dinner time! Mommy brought out yummy food. But where was Bubu? Running around the living room! Touching the sofa here, kicking the ball there. "Bubu, come eat!" "Wait! I'm still playing!"

pages.text: 妈妈端着碗追过来，喂了咘咘一口。咘咘嚼了两下——嗖！又跑走了！米粒掉在地上，青菜掉在衣服上。NOMI 看着满地的米粒，皱了皱眉头：“这样吃饭，好浪费呀。”
pages.text_en: Mommy chased after her with a bowl and fed Bubu a bite. Bubu chewed twice — zoom! Off she ran again! Rice on the floor, veggies on her clothes. NOMI looked at the rice on the floor and frowned. "What a waste!"

pages.text: NOMI 拍拍咘咘的小餐椅说：“你知道吗？这可不是普通的椅子哦！这是咘咘的——专属宝座！”椅子上有咘咘的名字贴纸，还有她最喜欢的小兔子图案。“坐上宝座才能开吃哦！”
pages.text_en: NOMI patted Bubu's little chair. "Did you know? This isn't just any chair — it's Bubu's special throne!" The chair had Bubu's name sticker and her favorite bunny picture. "You can only start eating when you're on your throne!"

pages.text: 咘咘爬上了小宝座！NOMI 坐在旁边，NONO 站在杯子上。“准备好了吗？”NOMI 问。“准备好了！”三个好朋友一起大喊：“开——饭——啦！”妈妈笑着鼓掌：“好棒！”
pages.text_en: Bubu climbed onto her little throne! NOMI sat beside her, NONO stood on the cup. "Ready?" asked NOMI. "Ready!" All three shouted together, "Din-ner-time!" Mommy clapped and smiled. "Wonderful!"

pages.text: 咘咘坐在宝座上，拿着小勺子舀了一口饭——啊呜！全都到嘴巴里了！不像刚才到处跑，米粒掉了一地。NONO 歪着头说：“坐着吃，一颗米粒都不浪费！”
pages.text_en: Sitting on her throne, Bubu scooped a spoonful of rice — yum! It all went in her mouth! Not like before when rice flew everywhere. NONO tilted his head. "When you sit and eat, not a single grain goes to waste!"

pages.text: 咘咘夹起一块胡萝卜，慢慢嚼——“咦？甜甜的！”以前跑着吃，嚼两下就吞了，什么味道都不知道。NOMI 笑着说：“坐着慢慢吃，才能吃到食物的美味呀！”
pages.text_en: Bubu picked up a piece of carrot and chewed slowly. "Hmm? It's sweet!" Before, she'd chew twice and swallow while running — never tasting anything. NOMI smiled. "Sit and eat slowly, and you can taste how yummy food really is!"

pages.text: NOMI 拿出一个小沙漏，放在桌上。“看！沙子在慢慢流哦。我们在沙漏漏完之前把饭吃完，就能去玩啦！”咘咘瞪大眼睛，认真地拿起勺子：大口大口！
pages.text_en: NOMI put a little hourglass on the table. "Look! The sand is flowing. If we finish before it runs out, we can go play!" Bubu's eyes went wide, and she picked up her spoon. Big bites!

pages.text: 一口、两口、三口……碗里的饭越来越少啦！青菜吃完了！胡萝卜吃完了！米饭也快见底了！咘咘看看沙漏——还有好多沙子没漏完呢！“我好快呀！”
pages.text_en: One bite, two bites, three bites... less and less in the bowl! Veggies gone! Carrots gone! Rice almost gone! Bubu checked the hourglass — still lots of sand left! "I'm so fast!"

pages.text: 咘咘把最后一口饭塞进嘴巴——啊呜！碗里干干净净！她举起空碗：“看！我吃完啦！”妈妈竖起大拇指：“咘咘真棒！坐好吃饭，又快又干净！”NONO 拍翅膀鼓掌。
pages.text_en: Bubu popped the last bite in — yum! The bowl was squeaky clean! She held up the empty bowl. "Look! All done!" Mommy gave a thumbs up. "Great job, Bubu! Sitting nicely, fast and clean!" NONO flapped and clapped.

pages.text: 吃完饭，咘咘的肚子饱饱的，浑身都是力气！她跑到客厅搭积木——一层、两层、三层！搭得比饿肚子的时候高好多！“吃饱了果然不一样！”咘咘开心地拍手。
pages.text_en: After dinner, Bubu's tummy was full and she felt strong! She ran to build blocks — one, two, three layers! Much taller than when she was hungry! "Eating well really makes a difference!" Bubu clapped happily.

pages.text: 从那以后，每次吃饭咘咘都会爬上自己的宝座。“开——饭——啦！”坐好吃、慢慢嚼、不浪费！碗碗亮晶晶！吃完饭，去玩耍，力气大大的！咘咘笑着说：“坐好吃饭真的更好吃！”
pages.text_en: From then on, Bubu always climbed onto her throne at mealtime. "Din-ner-time!" Sit nicely, chew slowly, don't waste! Sparkly clean bowl! After eating, time to play — with lots of energy! Bubu smiled. "Sitting nicely really does make food taste better!"
